_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Consensus clustering (Fig. 1d) and unsupervised hierarchical clustering (Online Resource Fig. 1h) of SWNTS-SWNs alone generated four stable clusters, which were specifically associated with the anatomic location of tumors
details: Generated four stable clusters from SWNTS-SWNs methylation data that were specifically associated with anatomic location of tumors
